mapper.sql: id, api_id, vehicle_no, lon, lat, date, altitude, vehicle_color, data_length, vec1, vec2, vec3, encrypt, data_type, alarm, time, state, direction, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into car_gps (id, api_id, vehicle_no, lon, lat, date, altitude, vehicle_color, data_length, vec1, vec2, vec3, encrypt, data_type, alarm, time, state, direction, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.apiId}, #{item.vehicleNo}, #{item.lon}, #{item.lat}, #{item.date}, #{item.altitude}, #{item.vehicleColor}, #{item.dataLength}, #{item.vec1}, #{item.vec2}, #{item.vec3}, #{item.encrypt}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.alarm}, #{item.time}, #{item.state}, #{item.direction}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update lon = values(lon), lat = values(lat), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select:
SELECT a.driver_name driverName, a.tel, a.vehicle_code vehicleCode, b.lon, b.lat, b.date, b.time, b.vehicle_no vehicleNo FROM car_driver a LEFT JOIN car_gps b ON a.vehicle_code = b.vehicle_no
and b.date LIKE #{date}"%"
AND b.time LIKE #{time}"%"
AND b.vehicle_no = #{vehicleNo}
GROUP BY b.time
